description: Covenant-threaded chunked BLS12-381 Groth16 verifier (Phase 2): 68 covenant-threaded chunks — g2check EIP-197 input validation (baton genesis) -> vk_x MSM -> baked-G2/prepared-VK optimal-ate Miller -> final exponentiation (witnessed fp12 inverse) -> verdict (mutable->immutable).
